chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1507 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objection. For hearing of MA No.3461/2021. For hearing of MA No.887/2021. For hearing of MA No.7597/2020. For hearing of MA No.7598/2020. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar advocate for intervener along with Mr.Zulfiquar Ali Korai advocate. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2020 and it was lastly came up in Court on 10.02.2025 when counsel for the petitioner sought time and it was ordered that such request is totally un-justified; however, in the interest of justice, the matter was adjourned for today. Today, none is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner to pursue this petition, which shows the lack of interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
